---
name: monitor-web
description: "Use when you need browser monitoring for bot state and chart-like visualization. Trigger words: monitor_web, web monitor, browser monitor."
---

# monitor-web

## Purpose
Run browser-based monitoring for bot status.

## Command (remote)
```bash
cd /home/satoshi/work/satosystem
./commands/monitor_web --host raspberry_pi --port 8080
```

Open: http://localhost:8080

## Local mode
```bash
cd /home/satoshi/work/satosystem
./commands/monitor_web --local
```
